description:
Most enterprises are being sold agentic meshes they're nowhere near ready to build.
An agentic mesh isn't a product you buy or a feature you switch on. It's an operating capability and you have to earn it. There are five real stages between where most organisations are today and a functioning agent mesh. Skipping them doesn't accelerate progress. It creates risk.
The blockers aren't the models. They're data quality, legacy integration, and governance structures that weren't built for autonomy. The companies winning aren't chasing the mesh. They're going deep on a small number of reliable agents in the most painful parts of the business. That's how trust gets built. And trust is what makes coordination possible.
If someone pitches you an agentic mesh today, don't ask how smart it is. Ask how it behaves on a bad day, and who owns the outcome.

#AgenticAI #IntelligentEnterprise #AIStrategy #DigitalTransformation
